name: terminal
description: Open-source Polymarket terminal — live book, trader leaderboard, self-custodial trading. No fees, no relayer, no builder credentials.
readme_summary: This repository provides an open-source, self-hosted trading terminal for Polymarket, offering a Bloomberg-style dark UI with real-time order book data via SSE and self-custodial trading execution. It aims to enhance the user experience for active traders by providing advanced features like detailed trader leaderboards and keyboard navigation, all without third-party relayer fees or backend secrets.
key_features: No third-party relayer or builder credentials
Live order book via SSE with client-side delta application
Markets view with infinite scroll and full-text search
Traders view with leaderboards and detailed profiles
Two trading modes: EOA and Safe mode
primary_use_case: To provide an advanced, self-hosted trading interface for Polymarket, enabling active traders to monitor markets, analyze trader performance, and execute trades with enhanced efficiency and control.
cover_image_prompt: A sophisticated, dark-themed trading desk in a futuristic, minimalist room. In the center, a large, glowing holographic display shows a real-time, rapidly updating order book with green and red lines, representing buy and sell orders. To the side, a detailed leaderboard of trader avatars and performance metrics is visible. A hand, subtly connected to a digital wallet interface, is shown placing a trade on the order book. Subtle data streams and glowing lines connect the elements, symbolizing the flow of information and trades. The repository name 'humanplane' is subtly integrated into a small UI element on the desk. The overall mood is professional, efficient, and technologically advanced, rendered in a 3D isometric illustration style with a cool, blue and purple color palette and sharp, clean details.

name: blackcandy
description: A self hosted music streaming server
readme_summary: Black Candy is a self-hosted music streaming server that allows users to manage and stream their personal music library. It provides a web interface for playback and management, with optional mobile applications for access on the go.
key_features: Web interface for music playback and management
Docker installation for ease of use
Mobile applications available for iOS and Android
primary_use_case: To provide users with a personal, self-hosted music streaming service, offering control over their music library and playback experience.
cover_image_prompt: A stylized, vintage record player sits at the center of a cozy, dimly lit room, with glowing musical notes gently floating upwards from the turntable. The notes transform into clean, organized digital streams that flow towards a subtle, abstract representation of a cloud or server in the background. Small, unobtrusive UI elements resembling a music player interface are visible on a nearby shelf. The overall mood is warm and personal, emphasizing the private and curated nature of the music collection. The art style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on soft lighting and a rich, inviting color palette, with the 'Black Candy' name subtly integrated into the design of the record player or room.

name: Falcon-Perception
description: Inference repo for Falcon-Perception and Falcon-OCR model, early-fusion, natively multimodal, dense Autoregressive Transformer models.
readme_summary: Falcon Perception is a PyTorch inference engine for a natively multimodal, autoregressive Transformer model capable of performing object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR from natural language queries. It offers various inference engines, including paged and batch processing for PyTorch and MLX (Apple Silicon), and supports deployment via an inference server.
key_features: Object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR capabilities
Inference engines for PyTorch (CUDA) and MLX (Apple Silicon)
primary_use_case: Performing object detection, instance segmentation, and OCR on images using natural language queries through an efficient inference engine.
cover_image_prompt: A digital artist's studio where a large, ethereal multimodal Transformer model, visualized as a glowing, interconnected network of eyes and text, is actively interpreting natural language prompts. On one side, the model 'sees' an image and, guided by a prompt like 'find the cat,' it precisely outlines the cat with glowing digital masks and bounding boxes. On another side, for an OCR prompt like 'extract text,' it translates complex document layouts into clean, structured digital text flowing onto a nearby screen. Subtle code snippets and data streams weave through the scene, connecting the artistic interpretation to the underlying AI technology. The style is a vibrant, futuristic digital painting with a focus on clear visual metaphors for perception and understanding.

name: cybermon
description: A futuristic mobile hardware monitoring dashboard.
readme_summary: CyberMon is a futuristic mobile hardware monitoring dashboard built with Svelte. It visualizes system statistics fetched from LibreHardwareMonitor, providing users with a clear overview of their device's performance on a mobile interface.
key_features: Visualizes system statistics (CPU, GPU, RAM, etc.)
Remote web server for data fetching
primary_use_case: To provide users with a sleek, mobile-first dashboard for real-time monitoring of their computer's hardware performance, leveraging data from LibreHardwareMonitor.
cover_image_prompt: A futuristic, holographic dashboard floating in a dimly lit, high-tech control room. The dashboard displays glowing, dynamic graphs and readouts representing CPU, GPU, and RAM usage, with subtle digital particles flowing from a stylized 'CyberMon' logo towards the display. In the background, a stylized representation of a computer's internal components (like a glowing motherboard or fan) is visible, with data streams connecting it to the dashboard. The overall mood is sleek and informative, with a blue and purple color palette. The style should be a 3D isometric illustration with a focus on clean lines and glowing effects, conveying advanced hardware monitoring.

name: Netflix-Prime-Auto-Skip
description: Automatically skip Ads, Intros, Credits, etc. on all major Streaming services
readme_summary: This repository provides browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge that automatically skip advertisements, intros, recaps, and credits on various major streaming services. It aims to enhance the viewing experience by removing unwanted content segments.
key_features: Automatic skipping of ads, intros, recaps, and credits
Support for major streaming services including Netflix, Prime Video, Disney+, Crunchyroll, and HBO
Available as browser extensions for Chrome, Firefox, and Edge
Installable on Android via Firefox or Kiwi Browser
Automatic DRM installation for streaming services
primary_use_case: To automatically skip non-content segments like ads and intros on streaming platforms, providing a seamless viewing experience.
cover_image_prompt: A digital illustration of a viewer comfortably relaxing on a couch, holding a remote control. In front of them, a large screen displays a streaming service interface, but instead of ads or intros, a magical, transparent barrier is actively deflecting and dissolving them into harmless digital dust. Subtle glowing lines connect the remote to the screen, representing the browser extension. The repository name 'Streaming Enhanced' is subtly integrated into the UI of the screen or a small digital overlay. The scene is bright and modern, with a focus on user comfort and uninterrupted entertainment, rendered in a clean, 3D isometric illustration style.

name: loopi
description: A desktop automation platform — control browsers, system cursor/keyboard, run shell commands, and orchestrate workflows with AI agents and 80+ integrations. Runs locally.
readme_summary: Loopi is an open-source desktop automation platform that allows users to build and run complex workflows locally. It offers visual workflow building, real browser automation, desktop control, system command execution, AI agent integration, and over 80 API integrations.
primary_use_case: Automating repetitive tasks on a desktop computer, including web browsing, application interaction, system operations, and AI-driven workflows, all managed through a visual interface or CLI.
cover_image_prompt: A skilled artisan, akin to a master clockmaker, meticulously assembling a complex, interconnected contraption on a workbench. Gears represent browser actions, levers signify desktop controls, and steam pipes symbolize shell commands. Small, glowing orbs of AI energy float around, guiding the artisan's hands. Integrated into the contraption are small, stylized icons of popular apps like Slack and Notion, showing the 80+ integrations. The artisan's workshop is filled with subtle digital elements like flowing data streams and small monitor screens displaying workflow progress. The overall scene is rendered in a warm, inviting 3D isometric illustration style, emphasizing precision and local control. The repository name 'Loopi' is subtly etched onto a blueprint on the workbench.
